channel.title: Amir Alavi
channel.description: My name is Amir. I frequently publish articles about IoT, control systems, and embedded software development on this website based on my latest research experience.

item.title: My Recent Project: ActiveCpp
item.description: Introducing ActiveCpp, a modern C++ library that simplifies asynchronous, event-driven programming.

item.title: Arduino Cheat Sheet Coaster: A Gold PCB Gift for Engineers
item.description: Arduino Cheat Sheet Coaster, Gold Printed Circuit Board, Unique Gift for Electronic Engineers, Scientists, and Students.

item.title: Share USB Devices with WSL & Docker Containers
item.description: In this post, I show you how to share USB devices with your WSL instances and Docker containers.

item.title: Firmware Co-Design & Development for IP Cores in C++/SystemC using Verilator
item.description: This guide discusses the practices in co-designing firmware and IP cores for FPGA-based solutions in C++/SystemC using Verilator.

item.title: Communication Patterns for Distributed Control Systems and IoT Devices
item.description: This guide reviews common communication patterns for IoT devices and distributed control systems.

item.title: DC-DC Buck Converter with Arduino Uno
item.description: This tutorial teaches the basics of DC-DC buck converters with a experimental Arduino-based circuit, for learning purposes.
